name: Grilled Tuna and Roasted Pepper Sandw. on Thyme Focaccia
recipeIngredient: 3 large red bell peppers -- roasted and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. If using tuna steaks, prepare grill.
- Season tuna steaks with salt and pepper.
- Grill on an oiled rack set 5 to 6 inches over glowing coals for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until just cooked through.
- Alternatively, grill in a hot well-seasoned ridged grill pan over moderately high heat.
- Transfer tuna to a platter and cool.
2. In a large sealable plastic bag, combine lemon juice, thyme, and 1/4 cup oil. Add grilled tuna and marinate chilled, turning occasionally, for at least 1 hour and up to 1 day.
3. If using canned tuna, drain tuna.
- Stir together with lemon juice, thyme, 1/4 cup oil, and salt and pepper to taste in a bowl.
4. In a bowl, toss parsley, onion, and remaining 2 tablespoons oil with salt and pepper.
5. Pat roasted peppers dry.
6. Halve focaccia horizontally.
- Layer one half with peppers, tuna, capers, and parsley salad.
- Top with remaining focaccia half, pressing gently.
- Cut lengthwise in half and crosswise into thirds to make 6 sandwiches.
- Cut sandwiches in half diagonally.
7. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap.
8. Chill sandwiches at least 1 hour and up to 1 day. Makes 6 sandwiches.
